name: start-story
description: Automates story setup: feature branch (with optional git worktree), sprint tracking, ATDD test suggestion, design guidance, contextual research, and plan mode entry
author: Knowlune Team

arguments.description: Story ID in format E##-S## (e.g., E01-S03). If omitted, picks next backlog story from sprint-status.yaml

changes: Added optional git worktree support via superpowers:using-git-worktrees skill integration
Added design guidance suggestion for UI stories via frontend-design skill integration
Enhanced UI story detection algorithm (keyword analysis + affected files)
Improved resumption logic for stories already in-progress
Added workflow recommendation (Review first vs Quick ship) based on story complexity
Initial release with core orchestration features
Branch creation and story file setup
ATDD test suggestion based on acceptance criteria
Parallel research agents (story context, code patterns, test patterns)
Plan mode entry with ExitPlanMode integration
